## 📋 Today's Overview
*June 29, 2026*

### Superconductivity (3 new today)

1.  **The study focuses on** superconducting order parameters, **employing** tomographic imaging of particle-hole interference via scanning tunneling microscopy (STM) **to address/solve** the challenge of detecting order parameter symmetry and topology.
2.  **The study focuses on** hybrid circuits of a superconducting resonator and a magnetic thin film, **employing** direct fabrication on yttrium iron garnet films **to address/solve** the achievement of strong coupling between propagating spin wave modes and microwave photons.
3.  **The study focuses on** twisted bilayer graphene-WSe₂ heterostructures, **employing** a Bogoliubov-de Gennes Hamiltonian derived from a continuum model with proximity-induced spin-orbit couplings **to address/solve** the theoretical investigation of the emergence of topological superconductivity.

### spin glass (1 new today)

1.  **The study focuses on** the quantum Sherrington-Kirkpatrick (SK) and 2D Edwards-Anderson (EA) spin glass models, **employing** large-scale numerical solutions of deGennes-Suzuki-Kubo mean-field quantum annealing dynamics **to address/solve** the estimation of their ground state energies for system sizes up to N=40000.

| 1 | **[Tomographic imaging of superconducting order using particle-hole interference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2503.16168v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Superconducting phases with exotic symmetries that differ from the underlying crystalline lattice are at the focus of superconductivity research. Yet, despite intense interest, detecting the order parameter symmetry and topology remains a major challenge. Real-space imaging near atomic impurities with scanning tunneling microscopy (STM) has been highly successful in revealing nodes of the superconducting gap, in particular in cuprate superconductors, however the order parameter phase winding has so far remained inaccessible by STM techniques. We demonstrate that STM can access this phase information by exploiting Young-type quasiparticle interference patterns generated by pairs of impurities acting as beam splitters. Superconducting order parameter tomography (SOPT), a technique proposed here, utilizes the response of real-space interference patterns of Bogoliubov quasiparticles to the controlled rotation of impurity configurations, allowing us to reconstruct the momentum space structure of the gap function $Δ(\vec{k})$. As a concrete example, we consider Strontium Ruthenate, whose superconducting order remains a subject of ongoing debate, and demonstrate how SOPT can distinguish between competing order parameter candidates. The Young's interference fringes, nodal directions, and rotating beams, detected by SOPT, encode information about both the nodes and phase winding of the superconducting order parameter. This method provides a broadly applicable route to identifying unconventional and topological superconductivity and establishes particle-hole interference as a new imaging modality for superconducting order.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>具有与底层晶格不同奇特对称性的超导相是超导研究的焦点。然而，尽管备受关注，探测序参量对称性和拓扑结构仍是一项重大挑战。利用扫描隧道显微镜（STM）在原子杂质附近进行实空间成像，在揭示超导能隙节点（尤其是铜氧化物超导体）方面取得了巨大成功，但序参量的相位缠绕迄今仍无法通过STM技术获取。我们证明，STM可通过利用由充当分束器的杂质对产生的杨氏型准粒子干涉图案来获取这一相位信息。本文提出的超导序参量断层扫描（SOPT）技术，利用博戈留波夫准粒子实空间干涉图案对杂质构型受控旋转的响应，能够重构能隙函数$Δ(\vec{k})$的动量空间结构。以序参量仍存争议的钌酸锶为例，我们展示了SOPT如何区分相互竞争的候选序参量。SOPT探测到的杨氏干涉条纹、节线方向和旋转光束，编码了超导序参量的节点与相位缠绕信息。该方法为识别非常规超导和拓扑超导提供了广泛适用的途径，并将粒子-空穴干涉确立为超导序参量的一种新型成像模式。</p></details> | 2026-06-25 | Archisman Panigrahi et al. |
| 2 | **[Strong coupling between propagating spin wave and microwave photons in a superconducting resonator](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.27279v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We demonstrate strong coupling between propagating spin wave modes and microwave photons in superconducting resonator-magnetic thin film hybrid circuits. By fabricating the resonator directly on yttrium iron garnet thin films grown on rare-earth-free Y$_3$Sc$_2$Ga$_3$O$_{12}$ substrates, we achieve strong coupling of both Damon-Eshbach and backward-volume spin wave modes to the resonator, with coupling strengths exceeding both the magnon and photon damping rates. Furthermore, we observe nonreciprocal spin wave radiation of the hybrid magnonic mode in the Damon-Eshbach configuration, highlighting the potential for incorporating intrinsic spin-wave nonreciprocity into hybrid magnonic systems. These results open new avenues for integrating spin-wave magnonics with cavity magnonics, and for harnessing spin waves for potential applications in quantum information science.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们证明了在超导谐振器-磁性薄膜混合电路中，传播自旋波模式与微波光子之间的强耦合。通过将谐振器直接制备在生长于无稀土Y$_3$Sc$_2$Ga$_3$O$_{12}$衬底的钇铁石榴石薄膜上，我们实现了达蒙-埃什巴赫模式和反向体自旋波模式与谐振器的强耦合，其耦合强度超过磁振子和光子的阻尼率。此外，我们在达蒙-埃什巴赫构型中观测到混合磁振子模式的非互易自旋波辐射，凸显了将本征自旋波非互易性融入混合磁振子系统的潜力。这些结果为整合自旋波磁振子学与腔磁振子学，以及利用自旋波在量子信息科学中的潜在应用开辟了新途径。</p></details> | 2026-06-25 | Yi Li et al. |
| 3 | **[Spin-orbit coupling driven topological superconductivity in twisted bilayer graphene-WSe$_2$ heterostructures](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.27013v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Commencing from the low-energy Bistritzer-MacDonald continuum model of twisted bi-layer graphene (tBLG) with proximity-induced Ising, Rashba, and intrinsic spin-orbit couplings (SOCs), we construct the corresponding Bogoliubov-de Gennes Hamiltonian with conventional $s$-wave pairing and theoretically investigate the emergence of topological superconductivity in it. The latter can possibly be experimentally demonstrated in tBLG, Niobium and tungsten diselenide heterostructures. The topological superconducting phases, bearing an effective $p$-wave pairing profile and exhibiting inverted band dispersion, are protected by a bulk gap and are topologically characterized by Chern numbers. In the absence of intrinsic SOC, variation of the twist angle and other SOC strengths yield extended gapless, trivial, and topological phases, with phase boundaries exactly matching the closing of direct band gaps. The topological regime exhibits clear band inversion in the combined particle-hole and spin space, along with distinct Bloch localization profiles compared to the trivial phase. Including intrinsic SOC generates additional topological phases and eliminates the gapless phase, indicating the enhanced stability of the gapped topological superconducting regime in tBLG.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>从具有邻近效应诱导的伊辛、拉什巴和本征自旋轨道耦合（SOCs）的双层扭转石墨烯（tBLG）的低能比斯特里策-麦克唐纳连续模型出发，我们构建了包含传统$s$波配对的相应博戈留波夫-德热纳哈密顿量，并从理论上研究了其中拓扑超导性的出现。后者可能在tBLG、铌和二硒化钨异质结构中通过实验证实。具有有效$p$波配对轮廓并呈现能带色散反转的拓扑超导相，受体带隙保护，并以陈数为拓扑特征。在本征自旋轨道耦合缺失的情况下，扭转角及其他自旋轨道耦合强度的变化会产生扩展的无能隙相、平庸相和拓扑相，其相边界与直接带隙的闭合精确对应。拓扑区域在粒子-空穴和自旋组合空间中表现出清晰的能带反转，并与平庸相比具有独特的布洛赫局域化轮廓。引入本征自旋轨道耦合会额外产生拓扑相并消除无能隙相，表明tBLG中有能隙拓扑超导相的稳定性得到增强。</p></details> | 2026-06-25 | Kamalesh Bera et al. |
| 4 | **[Correlation-Driven $d$-Wave Superconducting Dome from Pseudogap Spectral Reconstruction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2505.05761v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Previous theoretical studies [Nat. Phys. {\bf 16}, 1175 (2020)] based on the Hatsugai-Kohmoto model have examined the stability of $s$-wave superconductivity in strongly correlated systems, demonstrating that correlations alone can substantially modify superconducting behavior. Motivated by this perspective, but going beyond these studies, we perform self-consistent microscopic calculations of $d$-wave superconductivity in strongly correlated systems by employing an exactly solvable correlated model that hosts a pseudogap phase and a partially flat band [Phys. Rev. Lett. {\bf 133}, 166501 (2024)]. We show that pseudogap correlations and superconducting order affect the low-energy spectrum in qualitatively different ways: the former leads to a momentum-localized suppression of spectral weight, whereas the latter induces a coherent reorganization of quasiparticle excitations. Moreover, we demonstrate that the interplay between superconducting order and pseudogap correlations naturally generates a superconducting dome in the temperature-doping phase diagram, with optimal doping located near the quantum critical point separating the pseudogap and metallic phases. Furthermore, $d_{x^2-y^2}$-wave superconductivity is found to be remarkably robust, remaining energetically dominant over both $d_{xy}$-wave and $s$-wave pairing channels across a wide doping range. Our results offer a potential route for a direct and controlled connection between pseudogap correlations and the emergence of the superconducting dome in cuprates.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>先前基于Hatsugai-Kohmoto模型的理论研究[Nat. Phys. {\bf 16}, 1175 (2020)]探讨了强关联体系中$s$波超导的稳定性，表明仅关联效应即可显著改变超导行为。受此视角启发但超越上述研究，我们采用一个拥有赝能隙相和部分平带的可精确求解关联模型[Phys. Rev. Lett. {\bf 133}, 166501 (2024)]，对强关联体系中的$d$波超导进行了自洽微观计算。我们证明，赝能隙关联与超导序对低能谱的影响在本质上有别：前者导致谱权重在动量空间局域性抑制，后者则诱导准粒子激发发生相干性重组。此外，我们展示了超导序与赝能隙关联之间的相互作用会在温度-掺杂相图中自然产生一个超导拱顶，最佳掺杂位于分隔赝能隙相和金属相的量子临界点附近。进一步发现，$d_{x^2-y^2}$波超导具有显著稳定性，在宽掺杂范围内其能量主导性均超过$d_{xy}$波和$s$波配对通道。我们的结果为铜氧化物中赝能隙关联与超导拱顶出现之间建立直接且可控的联系提供了一条潜在途径。</p></details> | 2026-06-24 | Yue Yuan et al. |
| 5 | **[Emergence of Quasi-two-dimensional Superconductivity in W-doped Bulk Noncentrosymmetric 3$R$-TaSe$_2$](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.25416v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Noncentrosymmetric transition-metal dichalcogenides offer a rich environment for the study of unconventional superconducting phenomena. Here, we present a comprehensive analysis of single-crystalline W-doped 3$R$-TaSe$_2$, revealing weakly coupled anisotropic unconventional superconductivity at $T_c$ = 2.82(2) K, with an in-plane upper critical field exceeding the Pauli limit by 1.7 times. The angular dependence of the upper critical field, along with the observation of a Berezinskii-Kosterlitz-Thouless transition, reveals quasi-two-dimensional superconductivity. Crucially, magnetotransport reveals a distinct two-fold rotational symmetry within the superconducting state under in-plane fields, breaking the underlying three-fold lattice symmetry. These findings establish W-doped $3R\text{-TaSe}_2$ as a bulk model system for exploring intrinsic low-dimensional superconductivity and broken rotational symmetry, thus opening new directions for future quantum technologies.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>非中心对称过渡金属二硫族化物为研究非常规超导现象提供了丰富环境。本文对单晶W掺杂$3R$-TaSe$_2$进行了全面分析，揭示其在$T_c$ = 2.82(2) K处呈现弱耦合各向异性非常规超导电性，面内上临界场超出泡利极限1.7倍。上临界场的角度依赖性以及Berezinskii-Kosterlitz-Thouless相变的观测，证实了准二维超导电性。至关重要的是，磁输运测量显示在面内磁场下超导态内存在明显的二重旋转对称性，打破了底层晶格的三重对称性。这些发现确立了W掺杂$3R\text{-TaSe}_2$作为探索本征低维超导电性和旋转对称性破缺的块体模型体系，从而为未来量子技术开辟了新方向。</p></details> | 2026-06-24 | P. Manna et al. |
| 6 | **[Universal behavior of the condensation energy of Superconducting BCS Bose gases](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.25316v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Using the Boson-Fermion formalism of superconductivity we calculate the condensation energy for several superconductors ranging from conventional to unconventional, or high temperature superconductors. It is calculated as the difference between the Helmholtz free energies of the superconducting and the normal state, which is a gas of N attractive electron gas, while the superconducting state is formed by the condensed Cooper pairs taken as composite bosons, coming from a fraction of the electrons inside the Debye shell, plus those electrons inside and outside the Debye shell that are unable to pair. After giving the analytic expressions for the internal energy U and the entropy S we obtain the Helmholtz free energy F = U -TS for both the superconducting and the normal states as functions of temperature. In the search for universalities, we calculate the ratio of the condensation energy at T=0 to the Sommerfeld constant (the normal state electronic specific heat over the temperature when T it's almost zero) using two different methods: the Boson-Fermion formalism developed here, as well as an analytical expression deduced from a combination of the BCS and Ginzburg-Landau theories. We find for the Boson-Fermion formalism $E_{cond}/γ_0= 0.252\,T_{c}^{1.997}$, which is the same behavior described by the experimental fit of Kim et al $E_{cond}/γ_0= 0.2\,T_{c}^{2.06}$ and by the one recently reported by Tallon et al for overdoped cuprate superconductors; while for the Ginzburg-Landau-BCS we get the expression $E_{cond}/γ_0= 0.236\,T_{c}^{2}$, also in very good agreement with the partifirst method.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>利用超导电性的玻色子-费米子形式，我们计算了从常规到非常规乃至高温超导体的多种超导体的凝聚能。该能量计算为超导态与正常态（即N个吸引性电子气）亥姆霍兹自由能之差，其中超导态由凝聚的库珀对（视为复合玻色子，源自德拜壳层内部分电子）以及德拜壳层内外无法配对的电子共同构成。给出内能U和熵S的解析表达式后，我们得到超导态和正常态的亥姆霍兹自由能F = U - TS作为温度的函数。为探寻普适性，我们采用两种方法计算了T=0时凝聚能与索末菲常数（正常态电子比热与趋近零温温度之比）的比值：本文发展的玻色子-费米子形式，以及由BCS和Ginzburg-Landau理论结合导出的解析表达式。对于玻色子-费米子形式，我们得到$E_{cond}/γ_0= 0.252\,T_{c}^{1.997}$，这与Kim等人的实验拟合$E_{cond}/γ_0= 0.2\,T_{c}^{2.06}$以及Tallon等人近期关于过掺杂铜氧化物超导体的报道行为一致；而对于Ginzburg-Landau-BCS组合，我们得到表达式$E_{cond}/γ_0= 0.236\,T_{c}^{2}$，也与第一种方法吻合良好。</p></details> | 2026-06-24 | Juan José Valencia Acevedo et al. |
| 7 | **[Tripling of the Superconducting Critical Current Density in BaFe$_2$(As$_{1-x}$P$_x$)$_2$ Retained After Pressure Release](https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.01328v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Superconducting performance is tunable not only via chemical modification or defect engineering, but also through external parameters such as pressure, though this method remains less readily accessible. In this work, we study how compression influences vortex dynamics and critical currents in an iron-based superconductor. Specifically, we perform magnetization measurements using an off-the-shelf pressure cell to investigate the effects of hydrostatic pressures up to 1.08 GPa on the magnetic properties of BaFe$_2$(As$_{0.62}$P$_{0.38}$)$_2$ crystals across a range of temperatures $T$ and magnetic fields $H$. Although these pressures minimally affect the superconducting critical temperature, they produce a clear increase in the critical current density $J_c(T,H)$, a pronounced reduction in the rate of thermally activated vortex motion $S(T,H)$, and can change the dominant vortex pinning mechanism. Furthermore, the effects of pressure are irreversible: after pressurization and subsequent release at room temperature, high-density microcracks are observed and the crystals retain their enhanced critical current densities. The second magnetization peak vanishes above 18 K after the pressure cycle, which we attribute to a transition from predominantly $δκ$ pinning to a mixed mechanism of $δT_c$ and surface pinning. Lastly, a threefold increase in $J_c$, a more than 40\% reduction in $S$ at 8~K and 0.5~T, and an expanded elastic-creep region were achieved after $1-2$ pressure cycles. These findings demonstrate the potential utility of pressure cycling for improving $J_c$, which may offer a simpler alternative compared to approaches such as chemical doping or the introduction of artificial pinning centers.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>超导性能不仅可通过化学修饰或缺陷工程调控，还可通过压力等外部参数调节，但后者仍较难实现。本文研究压缩如何影响铁基超导体中的涡旋动力学和临界电流。具体而言，我们采用市售压力装置进行磁化测量，研究高达1.08 GPa的静水压力对BaFe$_2$(As$_{0.62}$P$_{0.38}$)$_2$晶体在变温T和变磁场H下磁性质的影响。尽管这些压力对超导临界温度影响甚微，但显著提高了临界电流密度$J_c(T,H)$，明显降低了热激活涡旋运动速率$S(T,H)$，并可改变主导涡旋钉扎机制。此外，压力效应不可逆：在室温加压及随后卸压后，观察到高密度微裂纹，且晶体保持增强的临界电流密度。压力循环后，第二磁化峰在18 K以上消失，我们将其归因于从以$δκ$钉扎为主向$δT_c$与表面钉扎混合机制的转变。最后，经过1-2次压力循环后，$J_c$提高了三倍，在8 K和0.5 T下$S$降低了40%以上，且弹性蠕变区域扩大。这些发现展示了压力循环在提升$J_c$方面的潜在应用，相较于化学掺杂或引入人工钉扎中心等方法，可能提供一种更简单的替代方案。</p></details> | 2026-06-23 | Jiangteng Liu et al. |
| 8 | **[A high-fidelity two-qubit gate for multimode superconducting P-mon qubits](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.24772v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>To scale superconducting quantum processors, it is essential to achieve long coherence times while engineering interactions that do not introduce additional decoherence channels. In superconducting qubit systems, this can be realized using multimode circuits that feature a protected qubit mode alongside a distinct mediator mode. Building on this concept, our recently developed P-mon qubit provides intrinsic protection against decoherence from the readout environment. We extend this approach to controlled two-qubit interactions, by exploiting the mediator modes of P-mons for on-demand coupling. Because direct interactions between the qubit modes are strongly suppressed, unwanted $ZZ$-type interactions are significantly reduced to below $3.6(5)~\text{kHz}$ in the idle state. When tuning the coupled mediator modes on resonance, the cross-Kerr interaction between the qubit and the hybridized mediator modes leads to a qubit-state dependent frequency shift. By selectively addressing these transitions, we implement a $180~\text{ns}$ long CZ gate and determine a fidelity of $99.62(4)~\text{%}$. These results represent a significant step toward a scalable superconducting architecture that maintains high performance at scale.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>为了扩大量子超导处理器的规模，必须在实现长退相干时间的同时，设计不引入额外退相干通道的相互作用。在超导量子比特系统中，这可以通过采用具有受保护量子比特模式及独立中介模式的多模电路来实现。基于这一概念，我们最新开发的P-mon量子比特能够从根本上防止来自读出环境的退相干。我们将此方法扩展到受控双量子比特相互作用，利用P-mon的中介模式实现按需耦合。由于量子比特模式之间的直接相互作用被强烈抑制，在空闲状态下，不需要的$ZZ$型相互作用显著降低至$3.6(5)~\text{kHz}$以下。当将耦合的中介模式调谐至共振时，量子比特与杂化中介模式之间的交叉Kerr相互作用会导致量子比特态依赖的频率偏移。通过选择性寻址这些跃迁，我们实现了一个$180~\text{ns}$长的CZ门，并确定其保真度为$99.62(4)~\text{%}$。这些结果标志着向可扩展且在大规模下保持高性能的超导架构迈出了重要一步。</p></details> | 2026-06-23 | Frederik Pfeiffer et al. |
| 9 | **[Coulomb screening of superconductivity in magic-angle twisted bilayer graphene](https://arxiv.org/abs/2412.01577v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The origin of superconductivity in magic-angle twisted bilayer graphene has been a subject of intense debate. While some experimental evidence indicated an unconventional pairing mechanism, efforts to tune the critical temperature by screening the Coulomb interactions have been unsuccessful, possibly indicating a conventional phonon-mediated pairing. Here we study a double-layer electronic system consisting of two twisted graphene bilayers in immediate proximity of each other but remaining electronically decoupled. By increasing the carrier density in one bilayer, we completely suppressed both the superconductivity and the correlated-insulator state in the adjacent magic-angle graphene. The observation of such a screening effect offers strong support for an unconventional mechanism of Cooper pairing in magic-angle twisted bilayer graphene, shedding new light on the underlying physics governing their properties.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>魔角扭曲双层石墨烯中超导性的起源一直是一个激烈争论的话题。虽然一些实验证据表明存在非常规配对机制，但通过屏蔽库仑相互作用来调节临界温度的尝试并未成功，这可能表明存在常规的声子介导配对。在此，我们研究了一个由两个紧密相邻但保持电子学解耦的扭曲石墨烯双层组成的双层电子系统。通过增加其中一个双层中的载流子密度，我们完全抑制了相邻魔角石墨烯中的超导性和关联绝缘态。这种屏蔽效应的观察为魔角扭曲双层石墨烯中的非常规库珀配对机制提供了有力支持，为理解其特性的基础物理提供了新的启示。</p></details> | 2026-06-23 | Julien Barrier et al. |
| 10 | **[Enhanced Tantalum Superconducting Resonator Performance via All-Surface Organic Monolayer Passivation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.22112v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Tantalum is a promising platform for superconducting quantum circuits, yet coherence times remain limited by dielectric losses from interfacial two-level systems (TLS), exacerbated by native oxide regrowth. Here, we implement molecular surface passivation using self-assembled organic monolayers on freshly etched tantalum and silicon in coplanar waveguide resonators. Surface characterization by contact angle, XPS, FTIR and TEM confirm the formation of ordered, nanometer-thick films that suppress oxide formation. Microwave measurements in the ~5-9 GHz range reveal internal quality factors up to 1.8x10^6 in the single-photon regime at 100 mK, representing a ~140% improvement over untreated devices with native oxide. Power and temperature dependent measurements attribute this enhancement to reduced TLS-induced losses. These results demonstrate that molecular passivation effectively engineers low-loss interfaces and provides a scalable route toward high-coherence superconducting quantum devices.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>钽是超导量子电路的一个有前景的平台，但其退相干时间仍受到界面双能级系统（TLS）介电损耗的限制，而原生氧化物的再生长会加剧这一问题。在此，我们在共面波导谐振器中，对新刻蚀的钽和硅表面采用自组装有机单分子层进行分子级表面钝化。通过接触角、XPS、FTIR和TEM进行的表面表征证实形成了有序的纳米级薄膜，抑制了氧化物的形成。在约5-9 GHz范围内的微波测量显示，在100 mK下的单光子区域，内部品质因数高达1.8x10^6，相较于未处理且带有原生氧化物的器件提升了约140%。功率和温度依赖性测量表明，这种提升归因于TLS引起的损耗降低。这些结果证明，分子钝化能够有效设计低损耗界面，并为实现高相干性超导量子器件提供了一条可扩展的路径。</p></details> | 2026-06-23 | Harsh Gupta et al. |
| 11 | **[Superconducting Berry Curvature Dipole](https://arxiv.org/abs/2410.21363v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Superconductivity and Bloch band Berry curvature responses represent two distinct paradigms of quantum coherent phenomena. The former relies on the collective motion of Cooper pairs while the latter proceeds from the momentum-space winding of Bloch wave functions. Here we reveal a superconducting Berry curvature dipole (BCD) that arises as a collective phenomenon in noncentrosymmetric superconductors. Strikingly, we find the superconducting BCD is sensitive to the phase of the order parameter and depends on the noncentrosymmetric structure of its pairing. This unusual property enables a BCD proximity effect in hybrid quantum materials that induces nonreciprocity even in a target centrosymmetric metal. We find a superconducting BCD naturally produces nonreciprocal electromagnetic responses that include dissipationless supercurrent-induced dynamical Hall conductivity as well as a giant second-order nonlinearity. This renders noncentrosymmetric superconductors an exciting platform for realizing unconventional dissipationless responses and their BCD responses a novel diagnostic of the structure of the superconducting gap.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>超导性和布洛赫带贝里曲率响应代表了量子相干现象的两种不同范式。前者依赖于库珀对的集体运动，而后者源于布洛赫波函数在动量空间中的缠绕。在此，我们揭示了一种在非中心对称超导体中作为集体现象出现的超导贝里曲率偶极矩（BCD）。引人注目的是，我们发现超导BCD对序参量的相位敏感，并依赖于其配对的非中心对称结构。这一不寻常的特性使得在混合量子材料中产生BCD邻近效应，即使在目标中心对称金属中也能诱导非互易性。我们发现，超导BCD自然会产生非互易电磁响应，包括无耗散的超流诱导动态霍尔电导率以及巨大的二阶非线性。这使得非中心对称超导体成为实现非常规无耗散响应的激动人心的平台，而其BCD响应则成为诊断超导能隙结构的新型工具。</p></details> | 2026-06-23 | Oles Matsyshyn et al. |
| 12 | **[Fluctuation exchange study on the electron-hole asymmetry of the superconductivity across 1/3 filling in the trilayer Hubbard model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.24126v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We study within the fluctuation exchange approximation the trilayer Hubbard model where three layers of the Hubbard model are coupled by large interlayer hoppings so that the overlap of the bonding, nonbonding, and antibonding bands is relatively small. We pay special attention to the band fillings close to 1/3, for which the bonding and nonbonding bands as a whole are close to half filling. For relatively small values of the onsite $U$, superconductivity roughly exhibits electron-hole symmetric behavior, as expected for a nearly half-filled two-band system. By contrast, an asymmetry appears when $U$ becomes large, where superconductivity is more favored in the hole-doped regime, i.e., in the regime where electrons are removed from 1/3 filling. We attribute this asymmetry to the asymmetric renormalization of the bonding, nonbonding, and antibonding bands when $U$ is large.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们在涨落交换近似下研究了三层哈伯德模型，其中三层哈伯德模型通过较大的层间跳跃耦合，使得成键、非键和反键带的交叠相对较小。我们特别关注接近1/3的能带填充，此时成键和非键带整体接近半填充。对于相对较小的在位$U$值，超导性大致表现出电子-空穴对称行为，正如近半填充双带系统所预期的那样。相比之下，当$U$变大时，出现不对称性，超导性在空穴掺杂区域（即从1/3填充中移除电子的区域）更受青睐。我们将这种不对称性归因于当$U$较大时，成键、非键和反键带的重整化不对称。</p></details> | 2026-06-23 | Yushi Yamada et al. |
| 13 | **[Multiple phases in K2Cr3As3: a playground for manipulating topological superconductivity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.24108v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Spin-triplet topological superconductors are rare but of fundamental interest as they can host Majorana bound states that can be used in fault-tolerant quantum computing. Recent efforts have been devoted to searching for spin-triplet states in U-based compounds, but these materials have a low transition temperature (Tc) and coexisting competing orders, which creates significant experimental challenges and often leads to contradictory conclusions. The Cr-based candidate K2Cr3As3 offers a promising alternative: it has a much higher Tc of 6.2 K and no magnetic order. Here we report a hallmark signature of spin-triplet superconductivity arising from the internal spin degrees of freedom via nuclear magnetic resonance measurements, and demonstrate the high tunability of the topological phases. We discovered three distinct superconducting phases and revealed the evolution of the paired-spins direction (d(k)-vector). At low magnetic fields, K2Cr3As3 evolves from a helical (Phase A) to a chiral state (Phase B) with a rotation of the d(k)-vector from in-plane to out-of-plane direction upon cooling, although both phases have point nodes in the gap. A linenodal gap is realized in the high-field Phase C, where the d(k)-vector lies in the basal plane. These findings establish K2Cr3As3 as a model spin-triplet superconductor and a promising platform for manipulating topological phases.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>自旋三重态拓扑超导体十分罕见，但由于其能容纳可用于容错量子计算的马约拉纳束缚态而具有基础研究价值。近期研究致力于在铀基化合物中寻找自旋三重态，但这些材料存在超导转变温度低以及共存竞争序的问题，这带来了显著的实验挑战并常导致矛盾结论。铬基候选材料K₂Cr₃As₃提供了有前景的替代方案：它具有高达6.2 K的转变温度且无磁有序。本文通过核磁共振测量报道了源于内部自旋自由度的自旋三重态超导的标志性特征，并展示了拓扑相的高度可调性。我们发现了三种不同的超导相，并揭示了配对自旋方向（d(k)矢量）的演化。在低磁场下，K₂Cr₃As₃随冷却从螺旋态（A相）演变为手性态（B相），伴随d(k)矢量从面内旋转至面外方向，尽管两相能隙均存在点节点。高场C相实现了线节点能隙，其中d(k)矢量位于基面内。这些发现确立了K₂Cr₃As₃作为模型自旋三重态超导体的地位，并为其成为操控拓扑相的有前景平台奠定了基础。</p></details> | 2026-06-23 | Seigo Ogawa et al. |
| 14 | **[Biophysical EPR Using Superconducting Resonators](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23952v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We present innovations that enable the use of superconducting resonators for high sensitivity, high bandwidth pulsed electron paramagnetic resonance (EPR) measurements on biologically relevant samples with enhanced stability and throughput. A custom-built X-band pulsed EPR spectrometer with AWG and digital IF capability generated by an FPGA was used to control a novel patterned thin film planar superconducting microstrip resonator capable of generating Rabi fields sufficient to achieve 6 ns pi/2 Gaussian pulses using a 100 W solid-state HPA. The system allows automated sequential calibration, measurement, and analysis of five 3.5 uL samples contained in a sample cartridge. Performance was validated through measurements of double electron-electron resonance (DEER) distances in a variety of spin-labeled protein samples with biologically relevant concentrations, including measurements below 10 uM. The results enable broadening the scope of applications for both superconducting resonators and the use of EPR in biotechnology.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们提出了创新技术，使超导谐振器能够用于对生物相关样品进行高灵敏度、高带宽的脉冲电子顺磁共振测量，同时提升稳定性和通量。利用具有任意波形发生器和由FPGA生成的数字中频能力的定制X波段脉冲EPR谱仪，控制了一种新型图案化薄膜平面超导微带谐振器，该谐振器使用100 W固态高功率放大器即可产生足以实现6 ns高斯π/2脉冲的拉比场。该系统可对样品盒中五个3.5 μL样品进行自动化的顺序校准、测量和分析。通过对多种生物相关浓度的自旋标记蛋白样品进行双电子-电子共振距离测量（包括低于10 μM的测量），验证了其性能。这些结果拓宽了超导谐振器以及EPR在生物技术中的应用范围。</p></details> | 2026-06-22 | Austin R. Gamble Jarvi et al. |
| 15 | **[Graph-based emulation of $d$-dimensional curved spaces with superconducting arrays](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.28942v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We introduce a framework for emulating graphs and, through them, curved spaces of arbitrary dimension, using arrays of superconducting wires. The array consists of two stacked layers of wires, horizontal and vertical, such that wires are parallel within each layer and perpendicular between layers. By discretizing a space into a graph, assigning a superconducting wire with a rigid phase to each vertex, and coupling pairs of wires through Josephson junctions according to the graph edges, arbitrary geometries and topologies can be engineered in a controlled setting. The superconducting phases then realize scalar field theories on the emergent geometry. We establish experimentally realistic conditions for implementing these architectures and develop a dictionary relating measurable circuit observables to quantities in the emulated field theory. As an application, we develop the implementation of hyperbolic (Anti-de Sitter) spaces of constant negative curvature and use them as an experimentally accessible platform to explore holographic duality in arbitrary dimensions. We investigate the effects of disorder in the Josephson couplings, which translate into metric variations in the bulk-boundary correspondence, and analyze their impact on boundary scaling exponents both analytically and numerically, finding that holographic duality remains robust even in the presence of strong disorder. Beyond holography, the framework opens a broad range of architectural possibilities, including the exploration of physics on highly nontrivial graphs and toy models of dynamical spacetimes.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们提出一个框架，利用超导导线阵列来模拟图结构，并进而模拟任意维度的弯曲空间。该阵列由水平与垂直两个堆叠的导线层构成，每层内导线平行，层间导线垂直。通过将空间离散化为图结构，为每个顶点分配一根具有刚性相位的超导线，并根据图边通过约瑟夫森结耦合导线对，可在受控环境中实现任意几何与拓扑结构。超导相位随后在涌现几何上实现标量场理论。我们建立了实现这些架构的实验现实条件，并开发了一个将可测量电路观测量与模拟场论中量相关联的字典。作为应用，我们开发了常负曲率双曲（反德西特）空间的实现方案，并将其用作探索任意维度全息对偶的实验可及平台。我们研究了约瑟夫森耦合中无序的影响，这转化为体-边界对应中的度量变化，并通过解析和数值方法分析了其对边界标度指数的影响，发现即使在强无序存在下全息对偶仍然稳健。超越全息原理，该框架开辟了广泛的结构可能性，包括探索高度非平凡图上的物理以及动态时空的玩具模型。</p></details> | 2026-06-22 | Mehmet Dede et al. |
| 16 | **[Fermi surface change and $d$-wave superconductivity in the square lattice Kondo-Heisenberg model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23799v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We study the two-dimensional Kondo-Heisenberg model on a square lattice, with the conduction electrons away from half-filling, using neural network quantum states. Mapping the ground-state phase diagram as a function of the Kondo and Heisenberg couplings, we identify (i) at weak Kondo coupling, antiferromagnetic Néel order with a Fermi surface whose enclosed area counts only the conduction electrons and is insensitive to the Néel order, and (ii) at strong coupling, a heavy Fermi liquid with a Fermi surface whose enclosed area counts both the conduction electrons and the spins. In the crossover between these regimes, we find $d_{x^2-y^2}$ superconductivity, evidenced by off-diagonal long-range order in the pair-pair correlations and a pairing-amplitude dome that coexists with the underlying magnetic phase. Our results establish Fermi volume change and unconventional superconductivity as intrinsic features of the two-dimensional Kondo-Heisenberg model.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们利用神经网络量子态研究了正方晶格上的二维近藤-海森堡模型，其中传导电子偏离半填充。通过绘制作为近藤和海森堡耦合函数的基态相图，我们识别出：(i) 在弱近藤耦合下，反铁磁奈尔序伴随费米面，其包围面积仅计数传导电子且对奈尔序不敏感；(ii) 在强耦合下，重费米液体伴随费米面，其包围面积同时计数传导电子和自旋。在这些区域之间的交叉区域，我们发现了d_{x^2-y^2}超导电性，证据来自对-对关联中的非对角长程序以及与底层磁相共存的配对振幅穹顶。我们的结果确立了费米体积变化和非常规超导电性是二维近藤-海森堡模型的内在特征。</p></details> | 2026-06-22 | Alexander Nikolaenko et al. |
| 17 | **[Reentrant superconductivity enabled by spin-orbit coupling: Application to UTe$_2$](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23638v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Reentrant superconductivity has been understood primarily in terms of the Jaccarino-Peter field-compensation effect or from a change of the strength in the pairing interaction. However, neither mechanism appears able to entirely explain the remarkable phase diagram of UTe$_2$. Here we propose a generic theory of the field-enhancement of opposite-spin Cooper pairings which does not necessitate the coexistence of magnetism or the vicinity of a magnetic quantum critical point. Our analytical treatment shows that the reentrance has its origin in the interplay of the sublattice degrees of freedom and spin-orbit coupling, which can can strikingly enhance opposite-spin Cooper pairings at strong Zeeman fields. Based on these results, we show that a pairing state with B$_{3u}$ symmetry can reproduce the highly anisotropic phase diagram of the reentrant superconducting state of UTe$_2$.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>重返超导电性先前主要被理解为贾卡里诺-彼得场补偿效应或配对相互作用强度的变化所致。然而，这两种机制似乎都无法完全解释UTe₂非凡的相图。在此，我们提出了一种关于同向自旋库珀对场增强的通用理论，该理论无需磁性的共存或磁量子临界点的邻近。我们的解析分析表明，重返现象源于子晶格自由度与自旋轨道耦合之间的相互作用，这种相互作用能够在强塞曼场下显著增强同向自旋库珀对。基于这些结果，我们证明具有B₃u对称性的配对态可以再现UTe₂重返超导态的高度各向异性相图。</p></details> | 2026-06-22 | Changhee Lee et al. |
| 18 | **[Helical Domain-Wall-Ring Networks Reshape Superconducting Correlations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23599v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Extended domain-wall networks emerging in moiré materials provide a distinct platform for quasi-one-dimensional electronic states. However, the interaction-driven orders in confined networks remain largely unexplored. Here, we discuss superconducting (SC) correlations in interacting helical domain-wall-ring networks that emerge in the closed topological domains formed within the moiré patterns of an underlying twisted bilayer honeycomb lattice. We first analyze the system within the framework of an infinite-size theory and show that inter-ring SC-pair tunneling is renormalization-group relevant and thus enhances SC correlations through inter-ring phase locking. To address finite-size effects resulting from the ring-network geometry, we present a self-consistent variational approach. Our analysis shows that even in the regime where the infinite-size theory predicts strongly-coupled pair tunneling, the induced phase-locking scale remains strongly suppressed. In contrast, the SC scaling dimension continues to decrease with decreasing twist angle and remains insensitive to the pair-tunneling strength, revealing a qualitative mismatch from the infinite-size expectation. This discrepancy demonstrates that ring networks do not simply approach their infinite-size counterparts but can exhibit qualitatively distinct collective behavior. Our study highlights how the interplay of confinement effects and ring-network geometry can reshape SC correlations.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>莫尔材料中形成的扩展畴壁网络为准一维电子态提供了独特平台。然而，受限网络中相互作用驱动的有序态在很大程度上尚未被探索。在此，我们讨论了在底层扭曲双层蜂窝晶格莫尔图案形成的闭合拓扑畴中出现的相互作用螺旋畴壁环网络中的超导关联。我们首先在无限大理论框架下分析该系统，并表明环间超导对隧穿是重整化群相关的，从而通过环间相位锁定增强超导关联。为了处理环网络几何结构导致的有限尺寸效应，我们提出了一种自洽变分方法。我们的分析表明，即使在无限大理论预测强耦合对隧穿的区域，诱导的相位锁定尺度仍然被强烈抑制。相反，超导标度维度随着扭曲角减小而持续下降，且对对隧穿强度不敏感，揭示了与无限大预期结果的定性失配。这种差异表明环网络并非简单地趋近其无限大对应物，而是可能表现出定性不同的集体行为。我们的研究强调了受限效应与环网络几何结构之间的相互作用如何重塑超导关联。</p></details> | 2026-06-22 | Yi-Chun Hung et al. |
| 19 | **[Influence of Harris disorder on quantum-critical superconductivity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23582v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>In the Hertz theory, a quantum critical metal is described by the coupling of a Fermi surface to fluctuations of a Landau-damped bosonic field $φ$, which may represent either an order parameter or a Higgs field for a transition without symmetry breaking. Scattering from $φ$ produces non-Fermi-liquid behavior in the normal state, while the same fluctuations mediate enhanced Cooper pairing. By the Harris criterion, symmetry-preserving disorder couples most strongly to the coefficient of the $φ^2$ term, locally tuning the system toward or away from criticality. This random mass (``Harris disorder'') leads to a finite density of localized low-energy $φ$ modes even when the fermionic states remain extended and continue to provide Landau damping. We study the onset of pairing mediated by these localized overdamped bosonic modes. Starting from a real-space linearized Usadel equation for the two-particle propagator, we show that the localized bosonic wave functions generate both a spatially random pairing vertex and an effective random potential for Cooper pairs. Numerical solution, a self-consistent Born approximation, and Lifshitz-tail analysis reveal two regimes of the pairing instability. At high temperatures, pairing nucleates compact superconducting puddles on the most localized bosonic modes. At lower temperatures, an extended pairing eigenstate appears, but its transition scale and spatial structure remain strongly affected by mesoscopic correlation effects and enhanced probability of returns to favorable regions of the localized bosonic glue. The resulting distribution of local pairing scales has a power-law tail, in contrast to the stretched-exponential tails of disordered BCS superconductors. This mechanism provides a route to broad gap inhomogeneity and superconducting puddles in quantum-critical metals, and offers an interpretation of STM measurements of the cuprates.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>在赫兹理论中，量子临界金属被描述为费米面与朗道阻尼玻色场φ的涨落耦合，该玻色场可代表序参量或用于无对称性破缺转变的希格斯场。来自φ的散射在正常态产生非费米液体行为，而相同的涨落则介导增强的库珀配对。根据哈里斯判据，保持对称性的无序与φ²项的系数耦合最强，从而局域地将系统调向或调离临界点。这种随机质量（“哈里斯无序”）导致局域化低能φ模式的有限密度，即使费米子态保持扩展并继续提供朗道阻尼。我们研究了由这些局域化过阻尼玻色模式介导的配对起始过程。从实空间线性化的乌萨德尔方程出发，我们证明局域化玻色波函数同时产生空间随机的配对顶点和库珀对的有效随机势。数值求解、自洽玻恩近似以及利夫希茨尾分析揭示了配对不稳定性的两个区域。在高温下，配对在最局域化的玻色模式上成核形成紧凑的超导液滴。在较低温度下，出现扩展的配对本征态，但其转变尺度和空间结构仍然受到介观关联效应以及返回局域化玻色胶有利区域概率增强的强烈影响。由此产生的局域配对尺度分布具有幂律尾，这与无序BCS超导体的拉伸指数尾形成对比。该机制为量子临界金属中宽能隙不均匀性和超导液滴提供了途径，并为铜氧化物的STM测量提供了解释。</p></details> | 2026-06-22 | Serhii Kryhin et al. |
| 20 | **[SuperCond-GNN: Scalable Graph Neural Network Surrogate for Superconducting Circuit Simulations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23548v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>This paper presents SuperCond-GNN, a graph neural network-based surrogate model for predicting the voltage distribution in high-temperature superconducting (HTS) magnets. HTS magnets are modeled as lumped-element equivalent circuits and mapped onto graph representations, enabling message passing GNNs to learn the electrical response as a function of circuit topology, material properties, and operating current. As a proof of concept, tape stacks of up to 10 tapes are considered across a range of circuit topologies and operating conditions. The surrogate is trained on data generated from circuit simulations and achieves a mean MAPE of 4.3 % within the prescribed design space. The predicted nodal voltages enable fast and scalable inference of current redistribution and local operating conditions across a wide range of circuit configurations. The effect of incorporating physics-informed regularization via Kirchhoff's current law is also evaluated, and generalizability to unseen topologies is assessed through zero-shot inference and few-shot fine-tuning. While demonstrated on tape stack circuits, the graph-based framework is topology-agnostic and naturally extensible to more complex HTS cable and magnet configurations, offering a scalable alternative to conventional circuit solvers for downstream applications such as design space exploration, current sharing analysis, and real-time magnet monitoring.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>本文提出了SuperCond-GNN，一种基于图神经网络的代理模型，用于预测高温超导磁体中的电压分布。高温超导磁体被建模为集总元件等效电路，并映射到图表示上，使得消息传递GNN能够学习作为电路拓扑、材料特性和工作电流函数的电响应。作为概念验证，考虑了在多种电路拓扑和工作条件下多达10根带材的带材堆栈。该代理模型在由电路仿真生成的数据上进行训练，在指定设计空间内实现了4.3%的平均绝对百分比误差。预测的节点电压使得能够快速且可扩展地推断各种电路配置下的电流重新分布和局部工作条件。还评估了通过基尔霍夫电流定律引入物理信息正则化的效果，并通过零样本推理和少样本微调评估了对未见拓扑的泛化能力。虽然该基于图的框架在带材堆栈电路上进行了演示，但它与拓扑无关，并且自然可扩展到更复杂的高温超导电缆和磁体配置，为下游应用（如设计空间探索、电流共享分析和实时磁体监测）提供了一种可扩展的替代传统电路求解器的方案。</p></details> | 2026-06-22 | Nandana Menon et al. |

### spin glass

| **#** | **Title** | **Abstract** | **Date** | **Authors** |

| 1 | **[Estimates of ground state energies for the quantum SK and 2D-EA model, using deGennes-Suzuki-Kubo mean-field annealing dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.29875v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We perform large scale quantum annealing of the Sherrington-Kirkpatrick (SK) spin glass up to a system size $N=40000$ to estimate its ground state energy using the deGennes-Suzuki-Kubo mean-field quantum Ising dynamics, extending the earlier results (reported in Eur. Phys. J. B {\bf 98}, 226 (2025)). Here we numerically solve the deGennes-Suzuki-Kubo annealing dynamics to obtain the spin configurations and subsequently the ground state energy for a given system size at the end of the annealing, starting from a quantum paramagnetic state. The method shows high efficiency, with an overall algorithmic cost of $O(N^3)$ in estimating the energy of the ground state. We later extend this quantum annealing study to estimate the ground state energies (starting again from the quantum paramagnetic phase, annealing down to any desired low value of the transverse field) for the Edwards-Anderson (EA) spin glass model on a square lattice.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们利用德热纳-铃木-久保平均场量子伊辛动力学，对谢林顿-柯克帕特里克自旋玻璃进行了系统规模达$N=40000$的大规模量子退火，以估算其基态能量，从而扩展了先前的研究成果（发表于《欧洲物理杂志B》第98卷，226页，2025年）。在此，我们通过数值求解德热纳-铃木-久保退火动力学，从量子顺磁态出发，在退火结束时获得给定系统规模的自旋构型，进而得到基态能量。该方法效率较高，估算基态能量的整体算法复杂度为$O(N^3)$。随后，我们将此量子退火研究拓展至方格上的爱德华兹-安德森自旋玻璃模型，同样从量子顺磁相出发，通过退火至任意所需的低横向场值，以估算其基态能量。</p></details> | 2026-06-25 | Soumyaditya Das et al. |
| 2 | **[Critical Universality of the SU (2) Gauge Glass Model Analyzed by the Dynamical Scaling Method](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.25618v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We investigate the critical phenomena of the three-dimensional (3D) $SU(2)$ gauge glass model, which can be regarded as the $O(4)$ spin-glass model with gauge symmetry. Using Monte Carlo simulations and the non-equilibrium relaxation method, we examine the critical behavior along phase boundaries across various degrees of disorder. Consistent with previous studies, we verify that weak disorder is irrelevant to the universality class; the critical behavior of the ferromagnetic-paramagnetic transition remains in the 3D $O(4)$ universality class of the pure ferromagnetic system. Additionally, we demonstrate that the paramagnetic-spin glass transition exhibits universal critical behavior independent of the disorder. Our findings provide valuable insights into the fundamental properties and universality of gauge glass models.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们研究了三维SU(2)规范玻璃模型中的临界现象，该模型可视为具有规范对称性的O(4)自旋玻璃模型。通过蒙特卡洛模拟和非平衡弛豫方法，我们考察了沿不同无序程度相边界处的临界行为。与先前研究一致，我们验证了弱无序对普适类无关；铁磁-顺磁转变的临界行为仍属于纯铁磁系统的三维O(4)普适类。此外，我们证明顺磁-自旋玻璃转变表现出与无序程度无关的普适临界行为。这些发现为规范玻璃模型的基本性质与普适性提供了重要见解。</p></details> | 2026-06-24 | Yosei Takada et al. |
| 3 | **[Offline Channel-Independent QAOA Angles for RIS Power Aggregation: Unit-Circle Phase Dictionaries and Infinite-Size Spin-Glass Limits](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.24540v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Reconfigurable intelligent surfaces (RIS) maximize received power by setting per-element phases. Discrete-phase optimization is NP-hard in the worst case, while the quantum approximate optimization algorithm (QAOA) applied to RIS faces limited phase alphabets, either per-problem angle optimization or uncharacterized training cost exposed to barren plateaus, and no scalable performance benchmark. We introduce a $2^{M}$-phase $θ$ dictionary for optimizing power $\|\mathbf{A} \, e^{jθ}\|^{2}$ having $K \times N$ channel matrix $\mathbf{A}$ and QAOA angle offline optimization with instance and size-independent infinite-size limit of the mixed-$q$ Gaussian ensemble of Basso et al. Our design bounds the spin-Hamiltonian interaction order to at most quartic for any $M$, and the deployed order-2 reduction lies below the even-$q\!\ge\!4$ regime in which constant-level QAOA limitations are proved. We perform analytical, state-vector, matrix-product-state and Pauli-path-simulation numerical studies for $N=K \leq 100$ and QAOA depth $p=9$, verifying offline angle transfer to Rayleigh, Rician/line-of-sight, cascaded double-fading and spatially-correlated RIS channels at $N\!\in\!\{5,12\}$. We observe performance reaching a near-optimal multi-start single-flip local-search reference for $N\!\le\!16$ under order-2 modeling with $2^{5}{=}32$-phase dictionary while the order-4 model shows a performance ceiling below the classical reference. The approach suggests a route to near-optimal large-$N$ performance on future fault-tolerant (FTQ) quantum computers, which enable the higher-depth QAOA circuits.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>可重构智能表面通过设置每个单元的相位来最大化接收功率。离散相位优化在最坏情况下是NP难问题，而应用于RIS的量子近似优化算法面临有限的相位字母表、每个问题角度的优化或暴露于贫瘠高原的未表征训练成本，且缺乏可扩展的性能基准。我们引入一个$2^{M}$相位的$\theta$字典来优化功率$\|\mathbf{A} \, e^{j\theta}\|^{2}$，其中包含$K \times N$信道矩阵$\mathbf{A}$，以及基于Basso等人混合$q$高斯系综的实例无关且规模无关的无限大极限的QAOA角度离线优化。我们的设计将自旋哈密顿量相互作用阶数限制为对于任意$M$最多为四次，且所采用的二阶约简低于已证明存在恒定水平QAOA限制的偶$q\!\ge\!4$区域。我们对$N=K \leq 100$和QAOA深度$p=9$进行了分析、态矢量、矩阵乘积态和泡利路径模拟数值研究，验证了在$N\!\in\!\{5,12\}$时离线角度向瑞利、莱斯/视距、级联双衰落和空间相关RIS信道的迁移。我们观察到，在采用$2^{5}{=}32$相位字典的二阶建模下，对于$N\!\le\!16$，性能接近多起点单翻转局部搜索参考的最优值，而四阶模型则显示出低于经典参考的性能上限。该方法为未来容错量子计算机上实现接近最优的大$N$性能提供了一条路径，这些量子计算机能够支持更高深度的QAOA电路。</p></details> | 2026-06-23 | Burhan Gulbahar et al. |
| 4 | **[Scalable Physics-Inspired Transformers for Spin Glasses](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.22984v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Efficient sampling of the Boltzmann distribution in frustrated spin glasses is central to statistical mechanics and combinatorial optimization. Despite advances in machine-learning-based approaches, two issues persist: limited understanding of why variational models fail to benefit from increased scale, unlike the monotonic scaling law of large language models; and high computational cost on large systems that negates advantages over classical sampling methods. Here, we develop a physics-inspired transformer with interpretable sparse attention and spin-tailored positional embeddings to address these challenges. By further leveraging FlashAttention for parallel ancestral sampling, it achieves up to two orders of magnitude speedup over vanilla variational autoregressive networks, enabling neural-network simulations of spin-glass systems to unprecedented sizes on a single GPU. It can resolve full probability distributions, free energies, and overlap statistics across temperatures, for Sherrington-Kirkpatrick and 2D or 3D Edwards-Anderson models, where existing machine-learning methods encounter limitations at certain temperatures. This framework thus establishes a scalable paradigm for frustrated spin-glass systems.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>在受挫自旋玻璃中高效采样玻尔兹曼分布是统计力学和组合优化的核心问题。尽管基于机器学习的方法取得了进展，但仍存在两个问题：对变分模型为何未能像大语言模型的单调缩放律那样从规模扩大中受益的理解有限；以及在大系统上的高计算成本抵消了相对于经典采样方法的优势。在此，我们开发了一种具有可解释稀疏注意力和自旋定制位置嵌入的物理启发式Transformer来应对这些挑战。通过进一步利用FlashAttention进行并行祖先采样，它比普通变分自回归网络实现了高达两个数量级的加速，使得自旋玻璃系统的神经网络模拟能够在单个GPU上达到前所未有的规模。它可以解析谢林顿-柯克帕特里克模型以及二维或三维爱德华兹-安德森模型在不同温度下的完整概率分布、自由能和重叠统计量，而现有机器学习方法在特定温度下会遇到限制。因此，该框架为受挫自旋玻璃系统建立了一个可扩展的范式。</p></details> | 2026-06-23 | Lu Zhong et al. |
| 5 | **[Irreversibility Enhances Quantum-Enhanced Markov-Chain Monte Carlo](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.23350v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Detailed balance underlies conventional Markov-chain Monte Carlo (MCMC) algorithms. Yet in classical systems, breaking detailed balance generates irreversible probability currents and can accelerate sampling. Whether irreversibility can similarly enhance quantum MCMC remains an intriguing question. Here we show that irreversibility provides a new route to improving the recent quantum-enhanced MCMC (QEMC), which combines quantum proposals with classical acceptance. By introducing state-dependent proposals that break detailed balance while preserving the target stationary distribution, we develop an irreversible quantum-enhanced Monte Carlo (IQEMC). Guided by Landau-Zener transitions, IQEMC promotes large energy descents from high-energy states while maintaining stable transitions near low-energy states. On spin-glass benchmarks, IQEMC outperforms QEMC without increasing computational complexity and, unlike the annealing baseline, exhibits a spectral gap that increases with system size and annealing speed. These results establish irreversibility as a physically grounded mechanism for enhancing quantum MCMC.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>细致平衡是传统马尔可夫链蒙特卡洛（MCMC）算法的基础。然而在经典系统中，打破细致平衡会产生不可逆的概率流，并可能加速采样。不可逆性能否同样增强量子MCMC仍是一个引人入胜的问题。本文证明，不可逆性为改进近期提出的量子增强MCMC（QEMC）提供了新途径，该算法将量子提议与经典接受相结合。通过引入打破细致平衡同时保持目标平稳分布的状态依赖提议，我们开发了不可逆量子增强蒙特卡洛（IQEMC）算法。在朗道-齐纳跃迁的引导下，IQEMC促进高能态向低能态的大幅下降，同时维持低能态附近的稳定跃迁。在自旋玻璃基准测试中，IQEMC在不增加计算复杂度的情况下优于QEMC，并且与退火基线不同，其谱隙随系统规模和退火速度增大而增大。这些结果确立了不可逆性作为增强量子MCMC的物理驱动机制。</p></details> | 2026-06-22 | Kefan Cao et al. |
| 6 | **[Universal energy-space localization and stable quantum phases against time-dependent perturbations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2510.14160v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Stability against perturbations is a highly nontrivial property of quantum systems and is often a requirement to define new phases. In most systems where stability can be rigorously established, only static perturbations are considered; whether any system can remain stable against generic time-dependent perturbations is largely elusive. In this work, we identify a universal phenomenon in driving $q$-local Hamiltonians called energy-space localization and prove that it can survive under generic time-dependent perturbations, where the evolving state is exponentially localized in an energy window of the instantaneous spectrum. For spin glass models where the configuration spaces are separated by large energy barriers, the localization in energy spaces can induce a true localization in configuration spaces and robustly break ergodicity. We then demonstrate its applications in several systems with such barriers. For certain LDPC codes, we show that the system remains localized near the original codeword for an exponentially long time even under generic time-dependent perturbations. For classical optimization problems with clustered solution space, the stability becomes an obstacle for quantum Hamiltonian-based algorithms to escape local minima. Our work provides a new lens for analyzing non-equilibrium dynamics of generic quantum systems, and versatile mathematical tools for establishing stability and for designing quantum algorithms.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>对扰动的稳定性是量子系统一个高度非平凡的性质，且通常是定义新相的条件。在大多数可以严格建立稳定性的系统中，仅考虑静态扰动；任何系统能否在一般时间依赖扰动下保持稳定仍是一个难以捉摸的问题。本文在驱动$q$-局域哈密顿量中识别出一种称为能量空间局域化的普适现象，并证明它在一般时间依赖扰动下能够存续，其中演化态在瞬时谱的能量窗口内呈指数局域化。对于构型空间被大能量势垒分隔的自旋玻璃模型，能量空间中的局域化可诱导出构型空间中的真正局域化，并稳健地打破遍历性。随后，我们展示了该方法在若干具有此类势垒的系统中的应用。对于某些LDPC码，我们证明即使在一般时间依赖扰动下，系统也能在指数长的时间内局域于原始码字附近。对于解空间具有聚类结构的经典优化问题，该稳定性成为基于量子哈密顿量的算法逃离局部极小值的障碍。本文为分析一般量子系统的非平衡动力学提供了新视角，并为建立稳定性和设计量子算法提供了多功能的数学工具。</p></details> | 2026-06-19 | Hongye Yu et al. |
| 7 | **[Self-averaging of replica overlaps in the random field Edwards-Anderson model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.18752v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The self-averaging of the replica overlap is proven in the Edwards-Anderson (EA) model under random field almost everywhere in the coupling constant space in any dimension. The EA order parameter is represented in terms of the derivative of the free energy density with respect to the random field strength, regardless of boundary conditions. Tasaki's correlation inequality for finite-dimensional spin glass models shows that the expectation of the squared replica overlap is bounded by the squared EA order parameter. These simple evaluations enable us to prove that the variance of the replica overlap vanishes in the infinite-volume limit. The self-averaging of the replica bond overlap is proven also in the EA model with Gaussian exchange interaction without random field. Short-range spin glass models have been shown to behave differently from mean-field spin glass models with RSB phase.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>在任意维度的随机场下，Edwards-Anderson (EA) 模型中复制重叠的自平均性在耦合常数空间几乎处处成立。EA 序参量可表示为自由能密度对随机场强度的导数，且与边界条件无关。Tasaki 关于有限维自旋玻璃模型的关联不等式表明，复制重叠平方的期望值受限于 EA 序参量的平方。这些简单估计使我们得以证明，在无穷体积极限下复制重叠的方差趋于零。在无随机场的高斯交换相互作用 EA 模型中，复制键重叠的自平均性同样得到证明。短程自旋玻璃模型已被证实与具有 RSB 相的平均场自旋玻璃模型行为不同。</p></details> | 2026-06-18 | C. Itoi et al. |
| 8 | **[Truncated Wigner dynamics of biclique quantum spin glasses](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.20187v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Quantum spin glasses are often considered testbeds for studying quantum optimization algorithms and as such have been the subject of various quantum advantage claims. Here we investigate the near adiabatic dynamics of biclique quantum spin glasses within the (discrete) truncated Wigner approximation (TWA). Benchmarks on small systems show that TWA recovers sample-to-sample fluctuations of the Edwards-Anderson order parameter, over a wide range of annealing times, with increasing fidelity when the system size increases. We extract critical exponents from the Binder cumulant in line with theoretical expectations, reproducing recent quantum experiments. The computational cost of the method is minimal and it can easily be applied to tens of thousands of qubits.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>量子自旋玻璃常被视为研究量子优化算法的试验平台，并因此成为各种量子优势声明的主题。本文在（离散）截断维格纳近似（TWA）框架下研究了双团簇量子自旋玻璃的近绝热动力学。小规模系统基准测试表明，TWA 能在广泛退火时间范围内恢复 Edwards-Anderson 序参量的样本间涨落，且随系统尺寸增大保真度提升。我们提取的 Binder 累积量临界指数与理论预期一致，并复现了近期量子实验的结果。该方法计算成本极低，可轻松应用于数万个量子比特的系统。</p></details> | 2026-06-18 | Dries Sels et al. |
| 9 | **[Cluster-based Message-Passing (CluMP) Optimization for Complex QUBO Problems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.15414v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Quadratic Unconstrained Boolean Optimization (QUBO) problems are widespread in both industrial applications and scientific studies. A QUBO problem corresponds to the optimization of a system of Ising spins defined on a generally sparse and heterogeneous graph. When the QUBO problem contains conflicting requests, the corresponding Ising system is frustrated, generating a complex energy landscape, which is hard to explore and optimize. Despite extensive algorithmic and hardware developments, finding low-energy configurations in these systems remains challenging (e.g., local-update heuristics typically become trapped in metastable states), especially when the (possibly frustrated) interactions generate extended correlated domains. We introduce CluMP (Cluster-based Message-Passing), an algorithm that performs collective updates on connected clusters of spins using information from Belief Propagation (BP). By controlling the amount of frustration within clusters, CluMP enables BP convergence on large subgraphs and proposes nonlocal rearrangements involving up to hundreds of spins in a single move. We benchmark CluMP against state-of-the-art local-update heuristics on spin-glass models defined on several graph topologies, including random regular graphs and lattice regular graphs in two and three dimensions. Cluster moves consistently bypass local trapping and reach lower energies with fewer effective operations than single-spin dynamics. These results demonstrate that frustration-tolerant cluster updates can be implemented efficiently on sparse graphs. The CluMP framework provides a scalable strategy for large-scale combinatorial optimization and inference problems, where exploiting medium- and long-range correlations is key to navigating complex energy landscapes.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>二次无约束布尔优化（QUBO）问题在工业应用和科学研究中广泛存在。QUBO 问题对应于定义在通常稀疏且异质图上的伊辛自旋系统的优化。当 QUBO 问题包含冲突请求时，相应的伊辛系统会产生阻挫，形成复杂的能量景观，难以探索和优化。尽管算法和硬件取得了长足发展，在这些系统中寻找低能构型仍具挑战性（例如，局部更新启发式算法通常会陷入亚稳态），尤其是当（可能阻挫的）相互作用产生扩展关联域时。我们提出 CluMP（基于聚类的消息传递）算法，该算法利用置信传播（BP）的信息对自旋的连通聚类执行集体更新。通过控制聚类内的阻挫程度，CluMP 使得 BP 能在大型子图上收敛，并实现单次移动中涉及多达数百个自旋的非局域重排。我们在多种图拓扑结构（包括二维和三维随机正则图及晶格正则图）上定义的自旋玻璃模型中，将 CluMP 与最先进的局部更新启发式算法进行基准测试。聚类移动始终能绕过局部陷阱，并以比单自旋动力学更少的有效操作达到更低能量。这些结果表明，阻挫容忍的聚类更新可在稀疏图上高效实现。CluMP 框架为大规模组合优化和推理问题提供了一种可扩展策略，其中利用中长程关联是导航复杂能量景观的关键。</p></details> | 2026-06-16 | Paolo Rissone et al. |
